title: calophyllum bracteatum
intro: Calophyllum bracteatum, also known as the Kalambi tree or Kamani, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of South Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum bracteatum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. In herbal preparations, the bark and seeds of the Calophyllum bracteatum are often used to make medicinal extracts, oils, and ointments that can be applied topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
